name: studio-braz-soberano
description: Sistema de Gestão de Elite - Studio Braz

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix projeto-estudio
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" -n "CÉREBRO,FACE" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix projeto-estudio"
